# vtm_traffic_ip_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `hash_source_port` (Boolean)
- `ip_assignment_mode` (String)
- `ip_mapping` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--ip_mapping))
- `ip_mapping_json` (String)
- `ipaddresses` (Set of String)
- `keeptogether` (Boolean)
- `location` (Number)
- `machines` (Set of String)
- `mode` (String)
- `multicast` (String)
- `note` (String)
- `rhi_bgp_metric_base` (Number)
- `rhi_bgp_passive_metric_offset` (Number)
- `rhi_ospfv2_metric_base` (Number)
- `rhi_ospfv2_passive_metric_offset` (Number)
- `rhi_protocols` (String)
- `slaves` (Set of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
